2026-04-20T20:10:31.3065667Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-20T20:10:31.3066115Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-20T20:10:31.3066489Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-20T20:10:31.3066803Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m

Supports reply_to_id for discussion threading.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"The comment text in Markdown format. This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. Provide helpful, relevant information that adds value to the conversation.","type":"string"},"integrity":{"description":"Trustworthiness level of the message source (e.g., \"low\", \"medium\", \"high\").","type":"string"},"item_number":{"description":"The issue, pull request, or discussion number to comment on. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"reply_to_id":{"description":"Node ID of the discussion comment to reply to, enabling threaded discussion comments. Only applicable for discussion comments — ignored for issue and pull request comments.","type":"string"},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. 2026-04-20T20:13:10.6314547Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-20T20:11:40.086234125Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58402,\"title\":\"[BUG] MetricsBatchQueryClient sends non-ISO 8601 timespan, causing 400 Bad Request\",\"body\":\"### Library name and version\\n\\nAzure.Monitor.Query 1.7.1\\n\\n### Describe the bug\\n\\n`MetricsBatchQueryClient.ExecuteBatchAsync` formats `QueryTimeRange.Start` and `QueryTimeRange.End` using bare `.ToString()` instead of `QueryTimeRange.ToIsoString()`. This produces a culture-dependent datetime string (e.g. `04/20/2026 18:10:35 +00:00`) that the regional batch metrics endpoint rejects with `400 Bad Request: Detected invalid time interval input`.\\n\\nThe single-resource client (`MetricsQueryClient`) does not have this issue — it correctly calls `options?.TimeRange?.ToIsoString()`\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nThe batch endpoint receives ISO 8601 formatted timestamps (e.g. `2026-04-20T18:10:35.0000000Z/2026-04-20T18:16:31.0000000Z`) and returns metric data.\\n\\n### Actual behavior\\n\\nThe batch endpoint receives `04/20/2026 18:10:35 +00:00/04/20/2026 18:16:31 +00:00` and responds:\\n\\n```\\n400 Bad Request: Detected invalid time interval input: 04/20/2026 18:10:35  00:00/04/20/2026 18:16:31  00:00, supported Iso 8601 time interval format\\n```\\n\\n(The `+` in `+00:00` is URL-decoded to a space, producing the double-space in the error message.)\\n\\n### Reproduction Steps\\n\\n```csharp\\nvar client = new MetricsBatchQueryClient(\\n    new Uri(\\u0026#34;https://eastus2.metrics.monitor.azure.com\\u0026#34;),\\n    new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n\\nvar options = new MetricsQueryOptions\\n{\\n    TimeRange = new QueryTimeRange(\\n        DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.AddMinutes(-10),\\n        DateTimeOffset.UtcNow),\\n    Granularity = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(5),\\n};\\noptions.Aggregations.Add(MetricAggregationType.Total);\\n\\n// This call will fail with 400 Bad Request\\nvar result = await client.QueryBatchAsync(\\n    new List { \\u0026#34;/subscriptions/.../providers/Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/myaccount\\u0026#34; },\\n    new List { \\u0026#34;TokenTransaction\\u0026#34; },\\n    \\u0026#34;Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts\\u0026#34;,\\n    options);\\n```\\n\\n### Environment\\n\\n- .NET 10\\n- `Azure.Monitor.Query` 1.5.0 and 1.7.1\\n- `Azure.Core` 1.51.1\\n- OS: Windows 11 / Linux (Container App)\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/58402\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"cf-ehakin\",\"id\":185221398,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/cf-ehakin\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/185221398?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"NONE\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-04-20T20:09:06Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-04-20T20:09:06Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
